description: MANDATE-15 masking case: two DISTINCT events on the SAME rule+service (latency-p95-high / frontend) so they share the same rolling metric_history bucket in detector.py — this is the exact bucket that used to get polluted by the pre-fix bug (raw outlier folded into metric_history, dragging mean/std upward for ~30 cycles). Event 1 is a short, noisy load-flood blip (self-resolving); event 2, ~4 minutes later once the flood has cleared, is a smaller but genuinely separate degraded-performance incident (imageSlowLoad). The detector must still catch event 2 — it must not be masked by the inflated baseline event 1 would have left behind pre-fix. See aiops/detector/test_detector.py::test_dynamic_detection_not_masked_by_prior_spike for the equivalent unit-level regression test.
